zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Keith Marischal of Scotland於大約1236年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾比時，他的父親John de Keith Marischal of Scotland26歲，母親Margaret Comyn20歲。他於大約1256年與Barbara De Seaton在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1293年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Keith Marischal of Scotland于大约1236年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾比时，他的父亲John de Keith Marischal of Scotland26岁，母亲Margaret Comyn20岁。他于大约1256年与Barbara De Seaton在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1293年在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Keith Marischal of Scotland was born about 1236, in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, John de Keith Marischal of Scotland, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Comyn, was 20. He married Barbara De Seaton about 1256, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1293, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Keith Marischal of Scotland est né environ 1236, à Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, John de Keith Marischal of Scotland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Comyn, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Barbara De Seaton environ 1256, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1293, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Keith Marischal of Scotland um 1236 in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Keith Marischal of Scotland 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Comyn 20. Er hat um 1256 in Scotland Barbara De Seaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1293 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Barbara De Seaton circa 1256, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William de Keith Marischal of Scotlandが約1236年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハンビで生まれた時，父John de Keith Marischal of Scotlandは26歳，母Margaret Comynは20歳であった。約1256年にスコットランドでBarbara De Seatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1293年に故郷で59歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハンビにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Keith Marischal of Scotland(이)가 대략 1236년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 훔비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Keith Marischal of Scotland(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Comyn(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1256년 스컷랜드에서 Barbara De Seaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1293년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 훔비에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Keith Marischal of Scotland родился около 1236 г. в местности хумби, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John de Keith Marischal of Scotland было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Comyn, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara De Seaton около 1256 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1293 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности хумби, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

Murió aproximadamente 1293, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
